headline: Automatic Data Processing CEO Says AI Marks ‘Defining Moment’ as Labor Market Stays Muted
summary: Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ:ADP) President and CEO Maria Black said the human capital management provider is seeing a “generally stable” but still muted labor environment, while positioning the company for what she described as a “defining moment” for the HCM industry. headline: ADP National Employment Report Preliminary Estimate for May 2, 2026
summary: For the four weeks ending May 2, 2026, U.S. private employers added an average of 42,250 jobs per week, according to the NER Pulse, a weekly update of the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER).
